item.title: Recursion in C: solved exercise to reverse a string
item.description: Solved recursion exercise in C to reverse strings, understand base case flow, and avoid common recursion mistakes.

item.title: Binary search in C: solved exercise on sorted arrays
item.description: Solved binary search exercise in C to find target indices in sorted arrays with O(log n) complexity.

item.title: Bubble sort in C: solved exercise step by step
item.description: Solved bubble sort exercise in C with comparisons, swaps, and early-exit optimization.

item.title: Insertion sort in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved insertion sort exercise in C with step-by-step logic, complexity analysis, and common mistakes.

item.title: Binary insertion sort in C: solved sorting exercise
item.description: Solved binary insertion sort exercise in C using binary search for insertion position and linear shifts.

item.title: Shell sort in C: solved exercise step by step
item.description: Solved shell sort exercise in C with gap sequence, complete implementation, and practical comparison with insertion sort.

item.title: Merge sort in C: solved exercise with divide and conquer
item.description: Merge sort method in C explained step by step with strategy, pseudocode, full solution, and O(n log n) complexity.

item.title: Quicksort in C: solved exercise with Lomuto partition
item.description: Solved quicksort exercise in C using Lomuto partition to sort arrays efficiently.

item.title: Linear search in C: solved exercise on unsorted arrays
item.description: Solved linear search exercise in C: sequential array traversal, index return, and comparison with binary search.

item.title: qsort in C: solved exercise with custom comparator
item.description: Solved qsort exercise in C to sort arrays with ascending and descending comparators.

item.title: bsearch in C: solved exercise on sorted array
item.description: Solved bsearch exercise in C to search sorted arrays using a comparator.

item.title: Selection sort in C: solved exercise step by step
item.description: Solved selection sort exercise in C to understand minimum selection at each pass.

item.title: Heap sort in C: solved exercise with max heap
item.description: Solved heap sort exercise in C by building a max heap for O(n log n) sorting.

item.title: Counting sort in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved counting-sort exercise in C for bounded-range integers.

item.title: Radix sort in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved radix-sort exercise in C for non-negative integers.

item.title: Interpolation search in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved interpolation-search exercise in C on uniformly distributed sorted arrays.

item.title: Euclidean algorithm (GCD) in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Euclidean algorithm exercise in C to compute the greatest common divisor.

item.title: Merge of sorted arrays in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to merge two already-sorted arrays into a third sorted one.

item.title: Remove duplicates from a sorted array in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to compact a sorted array in-place while keeping only unique values.

item.title: Maximum subarray (Kadane) in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Kadane algorithm exercise in C to find the maximum contiguous sum.

item.title: Sieve of Eratosthenes in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Sieve of Eratosthenes exercise in C to list primes up to a given limit.
